subsections.title: Highlight Cards
content: - BIRD execution accuracy reaches 75.63%: Reaches the top level among current open-source NL2SQL solutions
- Spider Test EX 89.65%: Stable leading performance on a classic benchmark
- SQL generation time <1 second: Suitable for high-frequency data access and real-time queries
- 50% lower labor cost: Lowers the data-access barrier for non-SQL users

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: Convert query requirements described by users in natural language into SQL queries.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry**: Information Technology
**Category**: Service
**Technology Category**: Large Language Model (LLM), Natural Language Processing, Data Governance, Foundation Model, Model Evaluation, NL2SQL, Database, Operations

subsections.title: 2.3 Implementation Cycle
content: - Demo development: 2-4 days

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo phase: 1 business expert, 1 algorithm expert

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - Traditional database operations require specialized operations staff or database administrators, and these roles need strong SQL proficiency; algorithm practitioners who need specific data also face the cost of learning SQL
- Traditional manual approval workflows are cumbersome and inefficient
- High data flow and large data volume create additional challenges for the task

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - User instruction understanding: Precisely understands SQL-generation requirements expressed in users' natural language
- Optimal SQL script generation: According to user requirements, screens and retrieves multiple candidate SQL instruction patterns, integrates, checks, and ranks them, and returns the optimal result

subsections.title: 3.1.1 Reasons for Best Practice Selection
content: - Leading performance: Uses the XiYanSQL-QwenCoder series, achieving EX 75.63% on BIRD and EX 89.65% on Spider Test, placing it among the top open-source solutions.
- Extremely fast response: Single SQL generation takes no more than 1 second, making it suitable for high-frequency queries and online interaction scenarios.
- Accurate and usable: Average SQL generation accuracy reaches 95%, significantly reducing manual rewriting and debugging cost.
- Significant cost reduction: Overall labor cost is reduced by 50%, enabling business users unfamiliar with SQL to retrieve data quickly.

subsections.title: 3.1.2 Version Information
content: - **Version Type**: Private Deployment - Server Deployment Edition
- **Team Name**: Real-World AI Reproduced and Verified
- **Chinese Name**: Alibaba Cloud Team
- **English Name**: Alibaba Cloud XGenerationLab
- **Author Website**: https://cn.aliyun.com/product/bailian/xiyan
- **Initial Release Date**: 2025-03
- **Last Updated**: 2025-10-31
- **Last Reviewed**: 2025-11-09
- **Key Dependencies**: XiYan-SQL · XiYanSQL-QwenCoder

content: [Practice Details](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/MwQwwdPv6iLNX0kRgS9c2eW0ndf?from=from_copylink)

subsections.title: 3.1.4 Metrics
content: **Core Business Metrics**
- Time to generate a single SQL script does not exceed 1 second
- Average accuracy of generated SQL scripts reaches 95%
- Reduce labor cost by 50%
**Core Technical Metrics**
- Same as the business metrics
